scripts.infra:up: docker compose up -d postgres redis zookeeper kafka kafka-init clickhouse
scripts.infra:dev: docker compose --profile dev up -d postgres redis zookeeper kafka kafka-init clickhouse kafka-ui
scripts.infra:logs: docker compose logs -f postgres redis kafka clickhouse
scripts.db:migrate: docker compose exec -T postgres psql -U intent -d intent_platform < db/migrations/001_initial_schema.sql && docker compose exec -T postgres psql -U intent -d intent_platform < db/migrations/002_add_declared_intents_and_listings.sql
scripts.db:seed: docker compose exec -T postgres psql -U intent -d intent_platform < db/seed.sql
scripts.setup: pnpm install && pnpm infra:up && node -e "setTimeout(()=>{},18000)" && pnpm db:migrate && pnpm db:seed
